allow: Bash(sips -g pixelWidth -g pixelHeight media/family/*.jpeg media/concert/*.jpeg media/street/*.jpeg media/boudoir/*.jpeg)

Bash(awk '/\\/media\\/events/{f=$0} /pixelWidth:/{w=$2} /pixelHeight:/{h=$2; split\(f,a,"/"\); name=a[length\(a\)]; if\(w>h\) orient="L"; else if\(h>w\) orient="P"; else orient="S"; printf "%s %s %dx%d ratio=%.3f\\n", name, orient, w, h, w/h}')
